VTU Diary Bot
=============

1. Double-click VTU-Diary-Bot.exe
2. Paste your diary JSON in the UI or use Load File
3. Choose browser (Chrome recommended)
4. Click Preview, then Run Bot
5. Log in to VTU in the browser window
6. Let the bot complete the run

Settings and last JSON are stored in %APPDATA%\VTU-Diary-Bot\
